ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playoff round */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the referees for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES playoff_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the team */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the team */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots made by the team */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots attempted by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the playoff round */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoff round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoff round */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games in the playoff round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_type_assignments" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, front office) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_charts" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., two-point, three-point) */,
  "shot_made" INTEGER /* Whether the shot was made */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the shot */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the shot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the shot */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance of the shot from the basket */,
  "shot_angle" REAL /* Angle of the shot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "team_id", "shot_type", "x_coordinate", "y_coordinate", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., shot, pass, rebound) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., made, missed, turnover) */,
  "time_elapsed" TEXT /* Time elapsed in the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the play occurred */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score at the time of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "team_id", "play_type", "play_result", "time_elapsed", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots made by the player */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)
